items.statcast_observation: Jac Caglianone produced the hardest tracked Royals contact: 111.9 mph at a 8.0 degree launch angle.
items.summary: The Royals lost to the Detroit Tigers, KC 3, DET 6. Maikel Garcia led the night, 3-3 | 2B, BB, RBI in the latest Royals game. Jac Caglianone supplied the loudest Royals contact at 111.9 mph.
items.title: Royals vs Tigers Recap
